window_summary: This window tracks the recent matomo-org/matomo release stream across stable releases 5.9.0, 5.10.0, 5.10.1 and pre-release alphas, betas, and release candidates for 5.10.0 and 5.11.0.

chunks.title: 5.10.0-alpha.20260415013741
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: matomo-org/matomo
Release: 5.10.0-alpha.20260415013741
Tag: 5.10.0-alpha.20260415013741; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-04-15T02:45:04Z; created_at: 2026-04-15T01:37:42Z
Release notes:
## Matomo 5.10.0-alpha.20260415013741 (Pre-release)
We recommend to read [this FAQ](https://matomo.org/faq/how-to-update/faq_159/) before using a pre-release in a production environment.
Please use the attached archives for installing or updating Matomo.
The source code download is only meant for developers and will require extra work to install it.
- Latest stable production release can be found at https://matomo.org/download/ ([learn more](https://matomo.org/docs/installation/)) (recommended)
- Beta and Release Candidate releases can be found at https://builds.matomo.org/ ([learn more](https://matomo.org/faq/how-to-update/faq_159/))
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the matomo-org/matomo release 5.10.0-alpha.20260415013741, this pre-release provides early access to upcoming changes and recommends reading the FAQ before using it in production.
